title: gladiolus stellatus
intro: Gladiolus stellatus, commonly known as the starflower or lesser cornflag, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Gladiolus stellatus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus stellatus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin to reap its medicinal benefits.
